flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 28% at CUNY York College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (4.4k vs 6.1k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at CUNY York College fell 22% between 2021 and 2024 (5.6k → 4.3k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at CUNY York College rose 11% between 2017 and 2020 ($9.9k → $11.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at CUNY York College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5% → 0.0%).
